longDescription:
Turn your Ulanzi D200X into a control surface for Claude Code — inspired by OpenAI's Codex Micro.

**Fleet view:** one key per live Claude session, color-coded (blue working, amber needs you, green unread result, red error). Press a slot to pin the whole deck to that session.

**Live tiles:** model, context % gauge, animated status, session cost, token counter, trend sparklines, permission mode, session timer, lines changed.

**Control:** contextual Allow/Deny keys that light up on permission prompts, plan-approval keys with dial-through-plan review, a command palette dial (/compact, /clear, /cost, ...), an effort dial, and a popup dashboard of all sessions.

**Follows you:** the deck automatically tracks whichever terminal tab you're working in (exact tty matching).

Setup: unzip, then run the bundled adapter installer once (INSTALL.md inside the zip). Requires macOS 12+, Claude Code, Node 20+.
